nasb.text: ‘This is the law of jealousy: when a wife, being under the authority of her husband, goes astray and defiles herself,

esv.text: “This is the law in cases of jealousy, when a wife, though under her husband’s authority, goes astray and defiles herself,

cnv.text: “這是關於疑忌的律例：妻子在自己丈夫的權下，如果背離丈夫，被人玷污了；

ccb.text: “这就是处理丈夫怀疑妻子不忠的条例。遇到妻子背着丈夫与人通奸，
